name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】New best-selling vintage-style shoulder bag, made from new soft lambskin, soft and premium leather. This Aventure leather handbag is inspired by the 09 M-series vintage design, with a restructured silhouette that reinterprets a unique shape, exuding a new personality. Embellished with embossed letter logo, adding a signature element. Retro gold hardware, linen blend lining, with a zip pocket inside. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry.
name_cn:

Embellished with embossed letter logo, adding a signature element. Retro gold hardware, linen blend lining, with a zip pocket inside. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry.
Model: 5BC182.
Size 33x19x5cm
Color: Brown/Original leather.
Made in Italy
